2541: From the Home screen, go to "Unit" → "Unit Formation" and set 4 Main Members. "Recommended Formation" is useful.
2542: From the Home screen, go to "Unit" → "Member Training" → "Training" and level up 1 member of your choice.
2543: From the Home screen, go to "Unit" → "Member Training" → "Limit Break" and increase the level cap of a member of your choice.
2544: From the Home screen, go to "Unit" → "Member Training" → "Skill Up" and raise the skill level of a member of your choice.
2545: From the Home screen, go to "Club" → "Customize" and set Club Items. "Recommended Placement" is useful.
2546: From the Home screen, go to "Club" → "Customize" → "Upgrade" and level up a Club Item of your choice.
2547: From the Home screen, go to "Menu" → "Profile" → "Change Character" and set a member of your choice.
2548: From the Home screen, go to "Live" → "Free Live" and play a song of your choice.
2549: From the Home screen, go to "Live" → "Groovy Mix Tours" and play a song from a tour of your choice.
2550: From the Home screen, go to "Unit" → "Member Training" → "Training" and raise 1 member of your choice to Lv. 60.
